summary: Design and validate the controlled R1 authoritative client runtime task graph
acceptance_criteria: Create exactly one controlled R1 task graph from the accepted docs/29 roadmap without starting product implementation.

Define RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001, RR1-COMMAND-PREVIEW-APPLY-ROUNDTRIP-001, RR1-READ-MODEL-DELTA-001, RR1-AUTHORITATIVE-TIME-CONTROLS-001, RR1-SAVE-LOAD-RESTART-001, RR1-HERMETIC-E2E-001, and RR1-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 with explicit ownership, dependencies, risk, paths, criteria, tests, and reviewers.
Order dependencies so only the smallest authoritative runtime foundation is READY after this graph enters origin/main and all later tasks are dependency-gated.
Keep fixture/no-op replacement, production Worker execution, deterministic browser/Node parity, save/load/restart, negative command behavior, and runtime evidence explicit in task criteria.
Preserve the retained M7 partial worktree as non-active evidence and keep Human Gate disabled.
Use no more than one writer and one independent reviewer for this process task; close both after terminal handoffs.
required_tests: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate for every created RR1 task
node -e parse all changed JSON files
git diff --name-only check proving no product or forbidden path changed
notes: This task authorizes task-graph and coordination evidence only; it does not authorize R1 product implementation.
The accepted forward authority is docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md.
Route systems REVIEW to an independent qa_reviewer before Lead integration.
next_action: Route the task-graph draft to systems_architect, then independent qa_reviewer; integrate the accepted graph before starting the first READY R1 implementation task.
